Event: Magic Well - September 2025
Event Date: 08/09/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A248
Magic Star Artifact

Triggers: 3 sec

Whirlwind of Change
A whirlwind sweeps through the battlefield. When it passes through allied units, it fortifies them. They recover 25% health, and their physical armor, magic armor, fortitude, and incoming healing are increased by 30% for 5 sec. Stacks up to 5 times. A fortified unit also recovers 250000 health over 5 sec.
When the whirlwind hits enemy units, improved withering is applied to them. It removes 3 random positive effects and reduces their stats by 25% for 5 sec. These enemy units also take pure damage equal to 20% of their max health.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
